name: Sichuan Mingxing Electric Power Co., Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Mingxing Electric Power Co., Ltd. produces and supplies electricity and water in China. It is also involved in the construction of power transmission and transformation projects, and hydropower projects; provision of equipment installation services; production and supply of natural gas; provision of hotel services; and mineral resources development activities. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Suining, China.
